objective: Pivot away from same-branch MARKET proxy tuning and discover independent local point-in-time data sources and signal blueprints for the next feature-layer tasks.
forbidden: Do not run a portfolio backtest.
Do not generate NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return outputs.
Do not promote any signal to a default model.
Do not use current constituents or latest weights as historical point-in-time data.
Do not create stock-return labels from unadjusted raw Tushare daily prices.
Do not tune V3.64/V3.65 same-branch thresholds.
acceptance_criteria: V3.65 manifest must show self_check_pass true and model_promotion_status blocked.
At least eight local source groups are inventoried.
At least three feature-layer candidate blueprints are discovered.
Current snapshot sources are explicitly blocked for historical validation.
A next validation queue is produced without portfolio or model-promotion outputs.
failure_conditions: Any portfolio harness or performance series is produced.
Any current snapshot source is marked historical validation ready.
quality_gates: agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Forbidden performance or promotion column scan returns zero hits.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: data_steward should start V3.67 by building a market participation breadth feature layer from Tushare daily-only partitions with an explicit raw-adjustment guard.
